summary: Implemented LLM-aware stream optimization and host-product matching with deterministic Vietnamese fallback when quota is exhausted or LLM is unavailable.

interfaceChanges.description: New API for per-session optimization suggestion with score-informed fallback.
New API for ranking host-product pairings using historical stream performance and recommendation scores.

recommendations: Persist per-shop LLM usage ledger during recommendation generation in issue #43 API path to enforce hard quota across workers.
Cache shop-level scoring baselines for host matching to avoid repeated score recalculation on large stream history.
